name: High Elf
description: As a high elf, you have a keen mind and mastery of magic.

name: Wood Elf
description: As a wood elf, you have keen senses and fleet feet.

name: Hill Dwarf
description: As a hill dwarf, you have keen senses and remarkable resilience.

name: Mountain Dwarf
description: As a mountain dwarf, you are strong and hardy.

name: Lightfoot Halfling
description: As a lightfoot halfling, you can easily hide from notice.
